items.example: I've always wanted to run a marathon.
I managed to finish the race in under four hours.
I'm proud of what I've achieved this year.
The most important thing was to keep going.
Learning Chinese was quite a challenge, but I enjoyed it.
I've never been able to swim very well.

items.phrase: One of my biggest achievements is…
items.translation: Одно из моих самых больших достижений…
items.example: One of my biggest achievements is graduating from university.

items.phrase: What I'm most proud of is…
items.example: What I'm most proud of is learning to play the piano.
